questionHtml: show that the distance travelled by the detector when it meets the muon source is 405 m.
markschemeHtml:
0.866c × half life = 0.866c × 1.56 × 10−6 = « 405 m»

OR

distance travelled by detector = Dy = D2 = «405 m» ✓

 

Working must be seen.

meta.title: show that the distance travelled by the detector when it meets the muon source is 405 m.
